content.full_text:
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
Sacramento, California 95814

Attention: Technical Assistance

Dear Sir:

I am the Treasurer for Miguel Pulido, Councilman for the City of Santa Ana in Orange County (Committee ID No. 861-055).

In November of this year a fundraiser was held by the Los Angeles City Club. Two founding members of the Los Angeles City Club arranged with the club for use of a room for the fundraiser event. There was no charge to the founding members for the use of this room since they are entitled to the use of this room as part of their yearly membership dues. Since this fundraiser was held for Councilman Miguel Pulido, how do we report the value for the use of this room? I know that it is an in-kind contribution, but I'm not sure we have to attach a value since there was no charge to the hosting members for use of the room.

Thank You,

Shirley L. Grindle  
Treasurer  
19051 Glen Arran  
Orange, California 92669  
714 633-0851
